PropertyString.name: name
PropertyString.help: The name of a stat in the StatCatalog

PropertyInt.name: id
PropertyInt.help: The id of a stat when StatType is set to ArrayStat

PropertyInt.name: valueType
PropertyInt.help: The type of value stored in a stat: Counter, String or Pair

PropertyInt.name: statType
PropertyInt.help: Enumeration of the type of a stat: Default(0) or Array(1)

PropertyInt.name: indexMin
PropertyInt.help: Minimum value of the possible range of ids for an ArrayStat

PropertyInt.name: indexMax
PropertyInt.help: Maximum value of the possible range of ids for an ArrayStat

PropertyIntList.name: availableAggregationTypeList
PropertyIntList.help: List of the available aggregation type enumerations for a Stat in the StatCatalog

PropertyString.name: statEnginePath
PropertyString.help: The path that the StatEngine uses to receive stats for a stat in the StatCatalog

Node.PropertyString: description Description Stat The description of a stat in the StatCatalog>
